hook.text: MAINOO STARTS FOR ENGLAND VS CROATIA TONIGHT

beats.text: THE 20-YEAR-OLD STARTS IN ENGLAND'S DOUBLE PIVOT
CROATIA BEAT ENGLAND IN THE 2018 SEMI-FINAL
WATCH LIVE ON ITV AT 9PM TONIGHT

caption: One of the most exciting players to come through Old Trafford in years — Kobbie Mainoo starts for England's World Cup opener tonight vs Croatia 🔴 The 20-year-old partners Declan Rice in the double pivot at AT&T Stadium, Dallas. England got beaten by Croatia in the 2018 semi-final. Tonight: revenge. Who are you backing? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #england #mainoo
